title: satureja elatior
intro: Satureja elatior, also known as the large mountain savory, is a perennial herb belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, with its essential oils exhibiting antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Satureja elatior include its potential to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and provide antioxidant protection against oxidative stress. Satureja elatior can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or dried extract, and is also used in traditional medicine as a component of various formulations.
